scenario.title: The Structured List
scenario.context: You're creating a troubleshooting guide and need AI to generate a decision tree of questions and answers. The output needs to be consistently formatted so it can be imported into your help desk software.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that produces structured, hierarchical output with consistent formatting that could be parsed programmatically.
scenario.exampleInput: Topic: 'App won't open'. Need 3-level decision tree with yes/no branches. For help desk import (needs consistent structure).
hints: How will you indicate parent-child relationships?
What markers will separate levels or branches?
How should yes/no paths be labeled?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear level definitions with visual/structural markers
scoringGuide.good: Levels defined but markers less clear

rubric.name: Labeling Scheme
rubric.description: Is a consistent numbering/labeling system defined?

rubric.name: Relationship Clarity
rubric.description: Are relationships between items clearly specified?

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Create a troubleshooting decision tree for 'App won't open'. Format it for help desk software import using this exact structure:

```
[LEVEL-1] Question text
  [YES -> LEVEL-2-A] Next question if yes
    [YES -> LEVEL-3-A1] Resolution or next step
    [NO -> LEVEL-3-A2] Alternative resolution
  [NO -> LEVEL-2-B] Next question if no
    [YES -> LEVEL-3-B1] Resolution or next step
    [NO -> LEVEL-3-B2] Alternative resolution
```

Formatting rules:
- Each level indented by 2 spaces from parent
- Level markers: [LEVEL-X] where X is depth (1, 2, 3)
- Branch markers: [YES ->] or [NO ->] followed by destination ID
- Terminal nodes (resolutions) start with [RESOLVE]
- Each node ID must be unique (LEVEL-2-A, LEVEL-2-B, etc.)

Example node:
```
[LEVEL-1] Is the app icon visible on your home screen?
  [YES -> LEVEL-2-A] Does the app briefly open then crash?
  [NO -> LEVEL-2-B] Have you recently updated your device?
```

Requirements:
- Minimum 3 levels deep
- Each question must have both YES and NO paths
- Terminal nodes must provide actionable resolution
- Maximum 15 words per question
